intro:
Chikkamagaluru is one of Karnataka's key cities, with a growing residential and commercial real estate market. ShiftIndia connects you with 215+ KYC-verified packers and movers covering every locality across Chikkamagaluru.

Get instant quotes, compare vendors side by side, and book in minutes — with transparent pricing and zero hidden charges.
whyUs: Chikkamagaluru's road network and traffic conditions require vendors who know the city well. Our verified partners plan every move for efficiency — whether it's a local 1 BHK shift or a long-distance relocation from Chikkamagaluru. ₹5 lakh damage protection, live GPS tracking, and pay-after-delivery on every booking.

faqs.q: What does a local move cost in Chikkamagaluru?
faqs.a: 1 BHK from ₹4,500. 2 BHK typically ₹6,500 – ₹12,500 depending on distance, floor, and packing.

faqs.q: Do you cover all areas in Chikkamagaluru?
faqs.a: Yes — our vendor network covers all residential colonies, societies, and commercial zones across Chikkamagaluru and its outskirts.

faqs.q: Is insurance included with every booking?
faqs.a: Yes. ₹5 lakh damage protection is included automatically with every ShiftIndia booking at no extra charge.
